---
title: "Hello World, Introducing the French Towns Lakehouse"
date: today
description: "First post: what this project is, what it builds, and what's coming."
categories: [meta]
lang: en
image: "https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/f38bd36f-bfc7-4fbf-931e-93a12b13a823/dhq7dpu-ea6b6660-0357-49db-a9f5-4845f2d29036.jpg/v1/fill/w_1031,h_775,q_70,strp/monsac_4_by_ericnarro_dhq7dpu-pre.jpg?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..KAHXCTy8F8cDqxIJG4vkGPY92pXz9L0J2IavyFwl_iw"
---

Welcome to the French Towns Lakehouse blog.

![Monsac, a French commune](https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/f38bd36f-bfc7-4fbf-931e-93a12b13a823/dhq7dpu-ea6b6660-0357-49db-a9f5-4845f2d29036.jpg/v1/fill/w_1031,h_775,q_70,strp/monsac_4_by_ericnarro_dhq7dpu-pre.jpg?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..KAHXCTy8F8cDqxIJG4vkGPY92pXz9L0J2IavyFwl_iw)

This project builds a self-hosted data lakehouse for all 35,000+ French communes.
It downloads open government datasets (INSEE, Laposte, data.gouv.fr) and scrapes
municipal label sites (flower cities, sports towns, heritage villages), then
transforms everything into clean, queryable Parquet files using DuckDB and dbt.

The blog has two main sections:

- **[Engineering](../../engineering.qmd)** , deep dives into
  the tech stack, data modelling decisions, pipeline architecture, and infrastructure.
- **[Insights](../../insights.qmd)** , analysis and findings
  from the data itself.

The [dbt documentation](https://enarroied.github.io/french_towns_lakehouse/docs/) shows the full data
lineage and model definitions.

All source code is on GitHub:
[github.com/enarroied/french_towns_lakehouse](https://github.com/enarroied/french_towns_lakehouse).

Stay tuned for more posts.
